creator: randomnoise058@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to leftfoot from comment #14)

Make has completed successfully:
=============================================
tail make.output

/bin/rm -f /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/openoffice-4.1.1/openoffice4/share/xdg/*.desktop.bak
/bin/rm -f -f /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/applications/openoffice-4.1.1
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/applications
/bin/ln -sf /usr/local/openoffice-4.1.1/openoffice4/share/xdg  /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/applications/openoffice-4.1.1
echo "share/applications/openoffice-4.1.1" >> /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/.PLIST.mktmp
for dir in `ls /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.1.1/main/sysui/desktop/icons/hicolor | /usr/bin/grep -v CVS`; do  for app in base calc draw impress math printeradmin writer; do  if [ -r /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.1.1/main/sysui/desktop/icons/hicolor/${dir}/apps/${app}.png ]; then  /bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/${dir}/apps/ ;  install  -o root -g wheel -m 0644 /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.1.1/main/sysui/desktop/icons/hicolor/${dir}/apps/${app}.png  /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/${dir}/apps/openoffice-4.1.1-${app}.png ;  echo "share/icons/hicolor/${dir}/apps/openoffice-4.1.1-${app}.png" >> /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/.PLIST.mktmp ;  fi  done ;  for iconfile in `cd /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.1.1/main/sysui/desktop/icons/hicolor/${dir}/mimetypes; ls *.png`; do  /bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/${dir}/mimetypes/ ;  install  -o root -g wheel -m 0644 /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.1.1/main/sysui/desktop/icons/hicolor/${dir}/mimetypes/${iconfile}  /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/${dir}/mimetypes/ ;  echo "share/icons/hicolor/${dir}/mimetypes/${iconfile}" >> /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/.PLIST.mktmp ;  done ;  done
echo "@unexec /bin/rm -f %D/share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 2>/dev/null || true" >> /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/.PLIST.mktmp
echo "@exec /usr/local/bin/gtk-update-icon-cache -q -f %D/share/icons/hicolor 2>/dev/null || true" >> /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/.PLIST.mktmp
echo "@unexec /usr/local/bin/gtk-update-icon-cache -q -f %D/share/icons/hicolor 2>/dev/null || true" >> /usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/.PLIST.mktmp
